subcodes.first_line: O thou who lovest the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name! When thou observest with the eye of truth, the Temple of the World is even as a human form [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محب جمال قدم و اسم اعظم هیکل عالم چون بحقیقت نگری بمثابه شخص انسانیست
subcodes.subjects: @attaining the life of the spirit, @evolution; human evolution, @The Holy Spirit, @firmness in the Covenant, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
